client_updates.highlight: Zeam: fixing multi-subnet aggregation issues; scaling to 128 validators next
Ream: running bottom-up multi-client devnets; stable to ~4700 slots with 3 clients
Ethlambda: new devnet 5 Docker image coming this week; passing most Hive spec tests
Grandine: CPU issue fix in progress; ~11 Hive tests will intentionally fail (no DB yet)

testing_progress.highlight: Ream, Ethlambda, and Gean have integrated HiveSpec test runner; other clients urged to do the same
Multi-subnet devnet running; aggregation not completing within slot interval for some clients (3–4s observed)

roadmap_and_priorities.highlight: DevNet 5 spec PR expected imminently; focus is recursive aggregation with single on-chain proof
Decision to hold on switching from 3SF Mini to Goldfish until stability is confirmed
Agreed plan: scale validators first, then integrate execution layer for full validator lifecycle and public devnet
LeanVM DevNet 5 branch on Lin Multisig is usable; currently on Cole Albert field, not Goldilocks (2x+ perf penalty)

documentation.highlight: New 'Cryptographic Specs' repo created by Justine Traglia to formally verify cryptography (SSZ, Poseidon, XMSS) in Lean with Python bindings

action_items.action: All lean clients: integrate HiveSpec spec test runner in Hive
Agree async on minimum validator count target before proceeding to execution integration
action_items.owner: Thomas Coratger, Gajinder Singh, lean client teams

decisions.decision: Stay on 3SF Mini for now; do not switch to Goldfish until stability is confirmed
Stabilization phase defined as: scale validators → integrate execution → launch public devnet

targets.target: DevNet 5 spec PR to be opened by tomorrow (May 14)
